title: Lucid Group Inc (LCID) Q2 2024 Earnings Call Highlights
text: Lucid Group Q2 2024 Earnings Call Highlights. Deliveries and Production. Lucid delivered 2,394 vehicles in Q2 2024, up 70.5% year-over-year and up 21.7% sequentially. The company's deliveries were 26.73% ahead of the analyst estimate of 1,889 vehicles. Vehicle production was 2,110 vehicles in Q2, and the company reaffirmed guidance to produce approximately 9,000 vehicles in 2024. Revenue and Guidance. Revenue was approximately $200.6 million in Q2, up 32.9% year-over-year and up 16.1% sequentially. The company updated 2024 CapEx guidance to approximately $1.3 billion from prior guidance of $1.5 billion. Liquidity. Lucid has sufficient runway at least into Q4 2025, inclusive of $1.5 billion commitment from an affiliate of the PIF. Profitability Challenges. Despite strong delivery and revenue growth, the company continued to face profitability challenges, with an adjusted EBITDA loss of $647.6 million in Q2.
